name: Dan Rose
connectionToCompany: Former VP of Partnerships at Facebook where he negotiated platform deals involving Apple iOS distribution and managed relationship with Apple leadership; now Chairman at Coatue Management
sourceNote: Former Meta/Facebook VP widely cited in tech press; left Meta around 2019 to join Coatue Management as Chairman
verificationNote: Gemini confirms Dan Rose is actually Chairman at Coatue Management, not currently affiliated with Meta Platforms. Company and role corrected to reflect actual current employer. Retained due to directly relevant former experience negotiating Apple platform deals at Facebook.

name: Ime Archibong
connectionToCompany: Oversees new product experiments at Meta, including efforts to develop alternatives to Apple iOS-dependent distribution channels
sourceNote: Publicly listed Meta VP in press releases and Meta newsroom announcements
verificationNote: Gemini confirms Ime Archibong is a VP at Meta Platforms. Role title unchanged as Gemini did not specify a different title. Retained as-is.

name: Vishal Shah
connectionToCompany: Leads Instagram product development heavily reliant on Apple iOS platform; directly impacted by Apple's ATT privacy changes affecting Meta's advertising revenue
sourceNote: Publicly identified as VP of Instagram in Meta press materials and tech media coverage
verificationNote: Gemini returned no result for Vishal Shah. No web evidence provided to contradict the listing. Retained as original source note references Meta press materials, but flagged as unverified by Gemini.
